title: cervaria latifolia
intro: Cervaria latifolia is a type of flowering plant, also known as sweet-scented centaury or broad-leaved centaury, belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as digestive problems. Cervaria latifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
